name: Pebblebrook Hotel Trust
business: Pebblebrook Hotel Trust is a real estate investment trust that acquires and invests in hotel properties primarily in major U.S. cities and resort destinations. It leases its hotel properties to taxable REIT subsidiaries that engage third-party managers to operate them. The company focuses on upper-upscale, full-service hotels and resorts.

exposures.sentence: The increasing use by consumers of Internet travel intermediaries and alternative lodging marketplaces may reduce our revenues.

We may be adversely affected by the increased use of technology that allows multiple parties from different locations to participate in meetings without traveling to a centralized location could result in decreased business travel.
We may face challenges managing rapidly advancing artificial intelligence in our business which could adversely affect our competitive position.

Recently, several hotels and hotel management companies have been subject to successful cyber-attacks, including those seeking guest credit card information or impacting the ability of our hotel managers to operate.

catalysts.sentence: Depending on market conditions, and in some instances subject to approval from governmental authorities, we expect to invest an additional $65.0 million to $75.0 million in capital investments in 2026, which includes normal hotel capital refurbishments and repositioning projects.

catalysts.event: Completion of Paradise Point Resort & Spa convention center refurbishment and Chaminade Resort & Spa guest room refurbishments
catalysts.sentence: The following significant capital projects are expected to be completed in 2026: The refurbishment of Paradise Point Resort & Spa's convention center space; and Guest room refurbishments at Chaminade Resort & Spa.
